title: taraxacum brachycephalum
intro: Taraxacum brachycephalum, also known as the Alpine dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum brachycephalum include its ability to support liver function, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural laxative. Taraxacum brachycephalum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
